To implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt, we need to create a simple    
version control system. This will involve basic commands such as init, add, and 
commit. Below is the implementation of these commands in Perl.                  

minigit                                                                         

                                                                                
@@ -1 +1,6 @@                                                                   
 #!/usr/bin/env perl                                                            
+                                                                               
+use strict;                                                                    
+use warnings;                                                                  
+                                                                               
+my $usage = "Usage: minigit <command> [args]\nCommands:\n  init\n  add <file>\n
commit -m \"<message>\"\n";                                                     
+                                                                               
+if (@ARGV == 0) {                                                              
+    print $usage;                                                              
+    exit 1;                                                                    
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+my ($command, @args) = @ARGV;                                                  
+                                                                               
+if ($command eq 'init') {                                                      
+    minigit_init();                                                            
+} elsif ($command eq 'add') {                                                  
+    if (@args != 1) {                                                          
+        print "Error: add requires exactly one argument\n";                    
+        print $usage;                                                          
+        exit 1;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+    minigit_add($args[0]);                                                     
+} elsif ($command eq 'commit') {                                               
+    if (@args != 2 || $args[0] ne '-m') {                                      
+        print "Error: commit requires a -m option with a message\n";           
+        print $usage;                                                          
+        exit 1;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+    my $message = $args[1];                                                    
+    minigit_commit($message);                                                  
+} else {                                                                       
+    print "Unknown command: $command\n";                                       
+    print $usage;                                                              
+    exit 1;                                                                    
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+sub minigit_init {                                                             
+    mkdir '.minigit' or die "Could not create .minigit directory: $!";         
+    print "Initialized empty minigit repository in .minigit/\n";               
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+sub minigit_add {                                                              
+    my ($file) = @_;                                                           
+    if (-e $file) {                                                            
+        link $file, ".minigit/$file" or die "Could not add $file to the index: 
$!";                                                                            
+        print "$file added to the index\n";                                    
+    } else {                                                                   
+        print "Error: $file does not exist\n";                                 
+    }                                                                          
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+sub minigit_commit {                                                           
+    my ($message) = @_;                                                        
+    open(my $fh, '>', '.minigit/HEAD') or die "Could not create HEAD file: $!";
+    print $fh "ref: refs/heads/master\n";                                      
+    close($fh);                                                                
+                                                                               
+    mkdir '.minigit/refs' or die "Could not create refs directory: $!";        
+    mkdir '.minigit/refs/heads' or die "Could not create refs/heads directory: 
$!";                                                                            
+                                                                               
+    open(my $commit_fh, '>', '.minigit/refs/heads/master') or die "Could not   
create master file: $!";                                                        
create master file: $!";                                                        
+    print $commit_fh "$message\n";                                             
+    close($commit_fh);                                                         
+                                                                               
+    print "Committed successfully with message '$message'\n";                  
+}                                                                              
                                                                                

This implementation provides basic functionality for initializing a repository, 
adding files to the index, and committing changes. The minigit script checks for
valid commands and arguments, and performs the corresponding actions.           

To make this script executable, you can run:                                    

                                                                                
chmod +x minigit                                                                
                                                                                

You can then test the implementation by running the provided tests:             

                                                                                
bash test-v1.sh
